LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT IS OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: REYES F. HUNTER CSR#6576, EMAIL: RHUNTER@SFTC.ORG.

LAW AND MOTION 302,PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT OF DEFENDANT NEDDY BACHO ENTERED ON JULY 10, 2015 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. COUNSEL FOR THE BANK IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. (D302/HK).
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 15287052) FILED BY DEFENDANT BACHO, NEEDY AN INDIVIDUAL ALSO FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BACHO, NEEDY AN INDIVIDUAL $8,182.99 PRINCIPAL, $295.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,477.99, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Jeffery Mukai
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Default.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s motion to set aside the default of defendant Neddy Bacho entered on July 10, 2015 is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Counsel for the Bank is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default
Off Calendar Jan-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S Motion To Vacate Default is off calendar without prejudice to being refiled. No proof of service filed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.
